title: Add realistic walk-the-book + slippage buffer to paper execution
objective: Make paper fills reflect what real-money orders would actually pay: volume-weighted walk-the-book + conservative slippage buffer, toggleable via config.
forbidden_actions: Modify orderbook data model beyond fill-output additions
required_work: 1. Implement volume-weighted walk-the-book fill given orderbook snapshot + side + size.
3. Return a fill record including filled_size, wbap, fill_px_with_slippage, partial flag.
5. Provide example fills for small / medium / large sizes from a real ob_snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Walk-the-book correctly computes VWAP from orderbook depth
Partial fill behavior works when size exceeds available depth
Slippage is applied and configurable; toggleable to disabled returns VWAP unchanged
Fill record populates actual_fill_px field used by attribution wiring
verification: Load an ob_snapshots sample and demonstrate 3 fills of varying size
Toggle paper_slippage_enabled false and confirm slippage path is bypassed
Confirm attribution record actual_fill_px reflects the new price
